title: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB
description: The ultimate iPhone with titanium design, A17 Pro chip, and advanced camera system featuring 5x optical zoom. ProMotion display with always-on functionality delivers stunning visuals.

title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Premium Android flagship with Galaxy AI features, 200MP camera, S Pen support, and stunning 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display. Ultimate productivity and creativity tool.

title: Google Pixel 8 Pro 128GB
description: Pure Android experience with Google AI features, exceptional camera with Magic Eraser, and guaranteed 7 years of updates. Best-in-class computational photography.

title: MacBook Air 15-inch M3
description: Impossibly thin and light with the powerful M3 chip. Up to 18 hours of battery life, stunning Liquid Retina display, and silent fanless design. Perfect for students and professionals.

title: Dell XPS 13 Plus
description: Premium Windows ultrabook with stunning InfinityEdge display, 12th Gen Intel processors, and cutting-edge design. Ultimate portability meets performance.

title: Microsoft Surface Laptop 5
description: Elegant touchscreen laptop with 12th Gen Intel Core processors, vibrant PixelSense display, and all-day battery. Perfect balance of style and substance.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with exceptional sound quality. 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and supremely comfortable for all-day wear.

title: AirPods Pro 2nd Generation
description: Adaptive audio with personalized spatial sound, advanced noise cancellation, and USB-C charging. Precision finding and touch control for seamless Apple integration.

title: Apple Watch Series 9 GPS 45mm
description: Advanced health and fitness tracking with ECG, blood oxygen, and temperature sensing. Bright always-on display, crash detection, and seamless iPhone integration.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic
description: Premium smartwatch with rotating bezel, comprehensive health tracking, and extended battery life. Elegant design meets powerful features for Android users.

title: iPad Pro 11-inch M2 128GB
description: Ultimate iPad with M2 chip performance, stunning Liquid Retina display with ProMotion, and Apple Pencil support. Professional creativity and productivity in a portable package.

title: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra
description: Massive 14.6-inch AMOLED display, powerful Snapdragon processor, and included S Pen. Premium Android tablet for content creation and entertainment.

title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description: Premium ergonomic mouse with ultra-quiet clicks, 8K DPI sensor, and multi-device connectivity. Customizable buttons and smooth MagSpeed scrolling for professionals.

title: Anker PowerCore 20000mAh Power Bank
description: High-capacity portable charger with fast charging support, dual USB ports, and premium build quality. Keep all your devices powered on the go.

title: LG 27-inch 4K UHD Monitor
description: Stunning IPS display with HDR10 support, USB-C connectivity, and excellent color accuracy. Perfect for creative professionals and productivity enthusiasts.

title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II
description: Premium true wireless earbuds with world-class noise cancellation, personalized sound, and all-day comfort. Touch controls and wireless charging included.

title: Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition
description: Premium e-reader with 6.8-inch glare-free display, adjustable warm light, and wireless charging. Waterproof design with weeks of battery life for avid readers.

title: GoPro HERO12 Black
description: Ultimate action camera with 5.3K video, HyperSmooth stabilization, and waterproof design. Perfect for adventures, vlogging, and extreme sports capture.
